---
title: "Contact"
---

```{=html}
<div class="contact-banner">
  <img src="images/clark_center_banner.jpg" alt="Clark Center, Stanford University">
</div>
```

## Cremer Lab · Stanford University

**Jonas Cremer**
Assistant Professor, Department of Biology
Stanford University

**Email:** [jonas.cremer@stanford.edu](mailto:jonas.cremer@stanford.edu)

**GitHub:** [github.com/cremerlab](https://github.com/cremerlab)

---

## Location

You can find us on the 3rd floor of the Clark Center, West Wing. Enter through door W3.3.

## Address

Need to send us something? Please address as follows:

```
Jonas Cremer
Assistant Professor
Department of Biology
Clark Center
318 Campus Drive
Rooms W3.3/W300B
Stanford, CA
94305
```
